title: Tide Pooling
summary: Flip rocks/logs on beach and meet PNW tide pool critters.
intro: Tide pooling quickly became one of my favorite hobbies after moving to WA. The switch from MN to the PNW brought a whole new set of creatures to discover and I spend many weekends combing the beaches and pools. Tap the rocks and driftwood logs on the beach below to see what's hiding underneath, and learn a real fact about each creature. Try to find them all.

inaturalist.heading: My tide pooling observations
inaturalist.blurb: Real critters I've logged on iNaturalist out on the rocks. Tap any photo to open the full observation.
